metadata.description: Personal fork of the Posit Claude Skills, refocused on science-centered R package development. Adds the r-science workflow spine; upstream Posit skills retained.

plugins.name: r-science
plugins.description: Science-centered R package development as a complete toolkit. The r-science workflow spine (plan -> tests -> implement -> verify -> benchmark/optimise -> review, correctness-first and functional by default) plus every other skill in this repo, so a single install pulls in the whole set.

plugins.name: posit-dev
plugins.description: General-purpose developer skills useful across any language, project type, or context

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: Skills for GitHub pull request workflows — creating PRs, addressing review feedback, and resolving threads

plugins.name: open-source
plugins.description: Collection of skills for open-source R and Python package developers

plugins.name: r-lib
plugins.description: Collection of skills for R package developers

plugins.name: ggsql
plugins.description: Skills for writing ggsql queries — a grammar of graphics for SQL

plugins.name: shiny
plugins.description: Collection of skills for Shiny app development
